title: Malik's School Garden Through the Seasons
synopsis: Follow Malik as he discovers how his school garden changes through spring, summer, and fall, learning about nature's beautiful seasonal cycle.

pages.text: Malik loves his school garden! Spring has come, and tiny green shoots peek up from the dark soil. Teacher Sara shows the children how to plant seeds in neat rows. 'Look!' says Malik, pointing at a little sprout. 'It's growing!' The spring sun feels warm on his face. Birds chirp in the trees above. Everything smells fresh and new. Malik waters his seeds with a small watering can. He can't wait to see what will grow!

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes kneeling in a school garden with spring pastel colors, holding a small watering can over tiny green sprouts emerging from dark soil, with other children and a teacher in the background, cherry blossoms on trees, soft pink and green tones
illustration.alt: Malik watering seeds in the spring school garden

pages.text: Summer is here! Malik's garden looks so different now. The plants have grown tall and strong. Bright red tomatoes hang heavy on green vines. Yellow sunflowers tower over Malik's head, following the sun across the blue sky. 'Wow!' Malik says as he picks a ripe strawberry. It tastes sweet and juicy. Butterflies dance from flower to flower. Bees buzz busily collecting nectar. The summer garden is full of life and color. Malik loves watching everything grow!

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes standing among tall summer plants with bright vibrant colors, reaching for red tomatoes on vines, surrounded by yellow sunflowers, colorful butterflies, and bees, brilliant summer sunshine with blues, reds, and yellows
illustration.alt: Malik harvesting vegetables in the bright summer garden

pages.text: Now it's fall, and Malik's garden has changed again! The leaves on the trees have turned orange, red, and gold. Big orange pumpkins sit ready to harvest. Malik helps gather the last tomatoes before the cold comes. 'Look at all we grew!' he says proudly. The garden gave them so much food to share. Soon winter will come, and the garden will sleep. But Malik knows that next spring, they'll plant seeds again. The garden will always come back!

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding a large orange pumpkin in an autumn garden with warm orange, red, and gold colors, fallen leaves on the ground, bare branches with remaining colorful leaves, harvest baskets filled with vegetables, cozy autumn atmosphere
illustration.alt: Malik with a pumpkin in the autumn school garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Malik plant in the spring garden?
questions.explanation: Malik plants seeds in the spring that grow into plants during the summer!

questions.question: What color are the sunflowers in summer?
questions.explanation: Sunflowers are bright yellow and follow the sun across the sky!

questions.question: What big orange vegetable grows in fall?
questions.explanation: Pumpkins are big and orange and ready to harvest in the fall!

questions.question: What happens to the garden after fall?
questions.explanation: In winter the garden sleeps, but it will wake up again in spring!
